entity.label: Zemaraim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town of Benjamin (Josh. 18:22); now the ruin, rather two ruins, es-Sumrah, 4 miles north of Jericho.

nodes.description: A town of Benjamin (Josh. 18:22); now the ruin, rather two ruins, es-Sumrah, 4 miles north of Jericho.

verses.text: And Betharabah, and Zemaraim, and Bethel,
